_comment: Single source of truth for the Kanban's drag-and-drop edges. Each entry declares a (from_status, target_column) pair the UI lets the user drop onto, together with the sidecar-side task.Status the drop ultimately transitions to. Go tests in sidecar/internal/task verify every (from_status -> sidecar_to) edge here is legal under allowedTransitions in transition.go, so the DnD rules in ui/lib/features/kanban/providers.dart cannot drift away from the state machine without failing CI.
